title: heterotheca camporum var. camporum
intro: Heterotheca camporum var. camporum, also known as prairie false goldenrod, is a perennial plant species native to the prairies of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Heterotheca camporum var. camporum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis.
